name: Forevercraft
summary: A massive RPG datapack with 140+ interconnected systems - quests, companions, artifacts, professions, housing, dreaming, raids, story mode, and more.
description:
Forevercraft transforms vanilla Minecraft into a full RPG experience. Features include:

- 50-chapter main story with 8 side branches (700+ chapters total)
- 100+ tameable companions with abilities and evolution
- 14 spirit weapons with unique ability trees
- 13 raid bosses with puzzle mechanics
- Infinite Castle with scaling difficulty
- Full artisan crafting system (alchemy, forging, cooking)
- Player housing with decoration and gardening
- Guild system with expeditions and diplomacy
- Dream Rate progression system
- Lore discovery with 162 collectible sets
- Quest board with 6 tiers
- And 130+ more systems
version_title: Forevercraft 26.1 — Major Bug Fix & Optimization Update
